overview: Smart Data Extender — a Bluetooth-connected data extraction tool that simulates and displays all device data types (video, audio, images, call logs, message logs, notifications, GPS) with bit-by-bit hex/decimal/binary analysis and readable previews side-by-side.
features: Bluetooth device scanning and GATT service tree
GPS tracking with coordinate bit analysis and history
Video panel with simulated MP4 metadata and hex dump
Audio panel with simulated MP3 metadata and waveform preview
Image panel with simulated JPEG/PNG metadata and thumbnail
Call logs panel with caller, duration, direction, and byte dump
Message logs panel with sender, text, timestamp, and byte dump
Notifications panel with app, title, body, and byte dump
Split-view for every panel: raw hex/decimal/binary + readable preview
Export All button downloads all session data as JSON
